title: Homepage Template Gap Analysis
objective: Compare the current homepage and stylesheet against the upstream conference-website-template and identify the structural and styling deviations that matter most before further implementation.
instructions: Focus on structure, layout system, navigation pattern, banner treatment, and any customizations that materially diverge from the upstream template aesthetic or information architecture.
Recommend the minimum Builder change set needed to restore template alignment while preserving the ATLAS workshop content already written.
constraints: Do not speculate beyond what is visible in the compared files.
expected_outputs: A prioritized gap analysis with explicit references to the current and upstream files.
A recommended minimum Builder follow-up plan.
definition_of_done: ResultPacket clearly identifies the highest-signal deviations and a concrete next implementation handoff.
